zh.lifeSummary: 當Jacob Zeiter於1613年10月1日出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特時，他的父親Jacob Zeiter25歲，母親Anna Maria Fuchsen24歲。他於大約1645年與Martha Zeiter在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1674年4月14日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jacob Zeiter于1613年10月1日出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖斯塔福特时，他的父亲Jacob Zeiter25岁，母亲Anna Maria Fuchsen24岁。他于大约1645年与Martha Zeiter在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1674年4月14日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特。

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

en.lifeSummary: When Jacob Zeiter was born on 1 October 1613, in Staffort, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Jacob Zeiter, was 25 and his mother, Anna Maria Fuchsen, was 24. He married Martha Zeiter about 1645, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 14 April 1674, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jacob Zeiter est né le 1 octobre 1613, à Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Jacob Zeiter, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anna Maria Fuchsen, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Martha Zeiter environ 1645, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1674, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jacob Zeiter am 1. Oktober 1613 in Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jacob Zeiter 25 und seine Mutter Anna Maria Fuchsen 24. Er hat um 1645 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Martha Zeiter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. April 1674 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jacob Zeiter è nato il il 1 ottobre 1613 nel Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Jacob Zeiter, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anna Maria Fuchsen, aveva 24 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Jacob Zeiterが1613年10月1日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセスタフォートで生まれた時，父Jacob Zeiterは25歳，母Anna Maria Fuchsenは24歳であった。約1645年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでMartha Zeiterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1674年4月14日に故郷で60歳で死去し，バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacob Zeiter(이)가 1613년 10월 1일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jacob Zeiter(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Maria Fuchsen(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1645년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Martha Zeiter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1674년 4월 14일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jacob Zeiter nasceu em 1 de outubro de 1613, em Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Jacob Zeiter, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anna Maria Fuchsen, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Zeiter aproximadamente 1645, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1674, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

ru.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg,: стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.Staffort, Karlsruhe, Baden Wurttemberg,: стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jacob Zeiter родился 1 октября 1613 г. в местности стаффорт, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Jacob Zeiter было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Maria Fuchsen, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Zeiter около 1645 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 14 апреля 1674 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jacob Zeiter nació el 1 de octubre de 1613, en Staffort, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Jacob Zeiter, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anna Maria Fuchsen, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Martha Zeiter aproximadamente 1645, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1674, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.
